summary: Iteration 74 - Drag & Drop Feature Testing for Gantt Chart. Backend reschedule endpoint fully tested (11/11 tests passed). Frontend drag & drop UI partially verified - legend shows 'Drag & Drop (maintenir)' instruction, but DEPLACABLE badge not visible in the external ReservationActionModal (only in GanttChart's internal popup which is not used).

integration_issues.issue: The DEPLACABLE badge is implemented in GanttChart's internal popup, but when onOpenReservation prop is passed (which it is in reservations.tsx), the external ReservationActionModal opens instead, which does NOT show the DEPLACABLE badge
integration_issues.note: The GanttChart code has the DEPLACABLE badge at line 521-526, but it's never shown because onOpenReservation is always passed

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add DEPLACABLE badge to ReservationActionModal for draggable reservations (status: confirmed/pending/pending_cash)
The drag & drop functionality itself works via web pointer events (onMouseDown/onMouseMove/onMouseUp) - requires manual testing with long press
critical_code_review_comments: Backend reschedule endpoint correctly validates: 404 for non-existent, 400 for completed/cancelled, 409 for conflicts
Backend correctly recalculates total_days and total_price on reschedule
Frontend GanttChart has all drag & drop code implemented: canDrag function, drag state, ghost preview, drag indicator bar
Legend now shows 'Drag & Drop (maintenir)' instruction with move icon
Drag mode indicator bar shows day offset and cancel button when dragging
Ghost preview (blue cells #BFDBFE) implemented for target position
Drop feedback toast shows success/error message
canDrag function correctly excludes active/completed/cancelled reservations

success_rate.frontend: 85% - All features implemented, one integration gap with DEPLACABLE badge

context_for_next_testing_agent: Drag & Drop feature for Gantt chart tested. Backend reschedule endpoint works correctly (PUT /api/admin/reservations/{id}/reschedule). Frontend has all drag & drop code but DEPLACABLE badge only shows in GanttChart's internal popup which is not used when onOpenReservation is passed. The drag functionality uses web pointer events with 300ms long press to start drag mode.

backend_reschedule_endpoint.success_reschedule_confirmed: PASS - Returns 200 with updated total_days and total_price
backend_reschedule_endpoint.price_recalculation: PASS - Correctly recalculates based on new duration
backend_reschedule_endpoint.invalid_dates: PASS - Returns 400 when end before start

frontend_drag_drop.legend_drag_drop_instruction: PASS - Shows 'Drag & Drop (maintenir)' with move icon
frontend_drag_drop.alert_bar: PASS - Shows retard(s), conflit(s), paiement(s) counts
frontend_drag_drop.grid_display: PASS - VEHICULE header, day columns, reservation bars
frontend_drag_drop.drag_indicator_bar: IMPLEMENTED - Shows day offset and cancel button (requires long press to test)
frontend_drag_drop.ghost_preview: IMPLEMENTED - Blue cells (#BFDBFE) for target position (requires long press to test)
frontend_drag_drop.drop_feedback_toast: IMPLEMENTED - Shows success/error message (requires drag completion to test)
frontend_drag_drop.deplacable_badge_in_popup: PARTIAL - Badge exists in GanttChart internal popup but not shown because external modal is used
frontend_drag_drop.grab_cursor_on_draggable: IMPLEMENTED - cursor: 'grab' style applied to draggable bars

playwright_tests_performed: Verify 'Drag & Drop (maintenir)' legend item is visible
Verify alert bar shows retard(s), conflit(s), paiement(s)
Verify toolbar elements (Jour, Semaine, Mois, Aujourd'hui)
Verify legend items (Disponible, Confirmee, En cours, En attente, Especes, Conflit)
Verify grid header shows VEHICULE column
Click on reservation bar - opens ReservationActionModal (not GanttChart popup)
Verified DEPLACABLE badge NOT visible in external modal
